name: flux-1.1-pro-ultra
description: FLUX1.1 [pro] in ultra and raw modes. Images are up to 4 megapixels. Use raw mode for realism.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio for the generated image
aspect_ratio.title: aspect_ratio

image_prompt.description: Image to use with Flux Redux. This is used together with the text prompt to guide the generation towards the composition of the image_prompt. Must be jpeg, png, gif, or webp.
image_prompt.title: Image Prompt

image_prompt_strength.description: Blend between the prompt and the image prompt.
image_prompt_strength.title: Image Prompt Strength

raw.description: Generate less processed, more natural-looking images
raw.title: Raw

safety_tolerance.description: Safety tolerance, 1 is most strict and 6 is most permissive
safety_tolerance.title: Safety Tolerance

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation
seed.title: Seed
